description_long: This is a modern commuter train carriage with a rectangular, elongated body and a dark exterior finish. The surface is adorned with patches of green and yellow, suggesting either decorative elements or weathering, possibly moss or graffiti. The train features a series of evenly spaced rectangular windows along both sides, providing visibility into the passenger compartment. Four sets of wheels are visible beneath the carriage, indicating it is designed for rail transport. The roof is flat and appears to have some minor detailing, possibly for ventilation or electrical equipment. No overhead wires are visible, and the doors are distributed along the sides, blending into the overall design.
description: A dark, rectangular commuter train carriage with green-yellow surface markings, side windows, and visible wheels beneath. The exterior is detailed and weathered, with doors and windows spaced along the sides.
description_view_0: Narrow end view showing the flat front or rear face with minimal detailing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, with windows, doors, and surface markings clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, showing the flat face and some roof detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with windows, doors, and markings visible.
